# BP-140 variant positive: sqlx StructScan is invoked without checking its error.
lang: go
file: BP-140-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: sqlx-structscan-bare
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct{}

func loadUser(db *sqlx.DB, user *User) error {
	rows, err := db.Queryx("SELECT id FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	rows.Next()
	rows.StructScan(user)
	return nil
}
